title: Ser estar quest
description: Practice choosing between ser and estar from context.

items.explanation: Use ser for identity, roles, and professions.
Use estar for location.
Use ser for a lasting trait or characteristic.
Use estar for temporary states and conditions.
Use ser for origin.
Use estar for the result of a condition or state.
Use ser for telling time.
Use estar with the present participle for actions in progress.

items.prompt: The table is made of wood.
distractors: La mesa está en la cocina.
items.explanation: Use ser for material or composition.

items.prompt: The party is at my house.
items.correct: La fiesta es en mi casa.
distractors: La fiesta está en mi casa.
La fiesta está en la calle.
items.explanation: Use ser for the location of an event.

distractors: La clase está en la escuela.
items.explanation: Use ser for a general description of what something is like.
Use estar for how someone feels.
